name: Green Prawn Curry
recipeInstructions:
Preparation time: 15 minutes
Cooking time: 15 minutes
Peel the prawns, leaving the tails intact. Slit open along the back and remove the dark vein.
In a food processor, grind the garlic, ginger, spring onions and chillies with the oil to a paste.
Transfer to a medium-sized pan and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the ground coriander, fennel and mustard seeds and coconut cream. Cook for 3-4 minutes.
Add 1/2 cup water to the garlic and spice mixture. Cook uncovered over medium heat for about 4 minutes.
Add the prawns until just tender and pink. Stir in the chopped coriander and serve immediately with rice.
